user.title: Set up Jura Coffee
user.description: Pick a discovered machine, or choose 'Enter manually' to type the IP.

data.pin: Front-panel PIN (leave blank if none set)

pair.title: Pair with the machine
pair.description: Press OK on the coffee machine to accept this connection. Waiting up to 60 seconds.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the machine. Check that the IP is reachable and the WiFi dongle is online.
error.pairing_timeout: The machine did not accept the connection in time. Press OK on the machine before submitting.
error.wrong_hash: The machine rejected the stored credentials. Re-pair the integration.
error.unknown: Unexpected error during setup. See the Home Assistant log for details.
